error_load_locale: [ERROR] Failed to load locale file. Please ensure you have cloned the repository completely. File path: {path}
description: MaaEnd 3rdparty binary dependency downloader; installs everything under agent/cpp-algo/3rdparty/
arg_webview2: Download the WebView2 SDK (Windows only; no-op on other platforms)
arg_update: Redownload if missing or if the installed version does not match the expected version
inf_webview2_skip_non_windows: [INF] Non-Windows target, skipping WebView2 SDK preparation
inf_webview2_already_installed: [INF] WebView2 SDK already installed and version matches ({version}), skipping
inf_webview2_version_mismatch: [INF] WebView2 SDK version mismatch (installed {installed}, expected {expected}), redownloading
err_webview2_cleanup_failed: [ERR] Failed to clean up old WebView2 SDK directory: {error}
err_webview2_invalid: [ERR] WebView2 SDK extracted but required file missing: {path}
wrn_webview2_version_write_failed: [WRN] Failed to write WebView2 version file: {error}
